headline: Martin Dubravka
body: Martin Dubravka is set to complete a move from Man Utd to Spurs.
text:
🚨 Martin Dubravka to Tottenham, here we go! Deal agreed for former Burnley and Man United goalkeeper to join #THFC.

Move completed today with Dubravka set to be backup GK at Spurs behind Kinski. 🔃🇸🇰

Guglielmo Vicario to leave this summer.
draft_caption:
🔵 DONE DEAL | Martin Dubravka joins Spurs — it's fully confirmed!

#FPLVortex #Transfers #THFC #MUFC
